summary: Tightened qd audit report validation so verificationEvidence.diffReviewed, verificationEvidence.completionReportReviewed, and verificationEvidence.verificationEvidenceReviewed must be true rather than merely boolean-shaped.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.diffReviewed set to false.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh now requires diffReviewed == true; evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/negative-smoke-diffReviewed-false.log records the focused rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.completionReportReviewed set to false.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh now requires completionReportReviewed == true; evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/negative-smoke-completionReportReviewed-false.log records the focused rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.verificationEvidenceReviewed set to false.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh now requires verificationEvidenceReviewed == true; evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/negative-smoke-verificationEvidenceReviewed-false.log records the focused rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing committed audit reports pass the stricter contract.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter true-only verificationEvidence contract.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and focused negative smokes for false verification flags.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains just-qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, line-counts.log, and one focused false-value negative smoke for each verificationEvidence flag.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no macOS-specific product behavior is changed or claimed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report validation only; no product runtime, platform, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
